snps.effect_template: Factor V Leiden mutation. A allele causes activated protein C resistance, major VTE risk factor.

recommendation_template: If carrier: inform doctors before surgery, during pregnancy, or when considering hormonal contraception. Avoid prolonged immobility. Stay hydrated during long flights.

studies.title: Mutation in blood coagulation factor V associated with resistance to activated protein C
studies.finding: Factor V Leiden (rs6025 A) confers 5x increased VTE risk (heterozygous)
